description: Design token motion scale display. Shows easing curves with animated preview dots and/or durations as bars.

attributes.name: tokens
attributes.description: Comma-separated token names (defaults vary by type).

attributes.name: prefix
attributes.description: CSS variable prefix. Auto-set to --ease- or --duration- from type.

attributes.name: duration
attributes.description: Animation duration for easing previews (only applies to easing rows).
